title: Doctor human-readable output shows malformed project config issues
description: Black-box smoke for `armature doctor --cwd <dir>` when the target project contains an invalid `.armature.json`.
input: Create a temporary target project with an invalid `.armature.json`, run `armature doctor --cwd <dir>`, and verify the human-readable output surfaces the `project-config` issue block.
command: bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; TMP_HOME=$(mktemp -d); TMP_PROJECT=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf $TMP_HOME $TMP_PROJECT" EXIT; mkdir -p "$TMP_HOME/.armature"; printf "{bad json\n" > "$TMP_PROJECT/.armature.json"; env -i PATH="$PATH" HOME="$TMP_HOME" ARMATURE_HOME="$TMP_HOME/.armature" ARMATURE_PROVIDER=openai OPENAI_API_KEY=test-openai-key node dist/bin/armature.js doctor --cwd "$TMP_PROJECT"'
